name: OncoQuest Pharmaceuticals Inc.
summary: OncoQuest Pharmaceuticals Inc. engages in the automotive interior carpet business in South Korea and internationally. It offers oregovomab, an anti-CA-125 antibody for the treatment of ovarian cancer. The company also develops products for the treatment of pancreatic cancer and metastatic breast cancer. OncoQuest Pharmaceuticals Inc. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Miryang-si, South Korea.
